hooks.name: Auto commit and push on file save
hooks.description: Automatically commits and pushes all changes to GitHub after every file save

action.prompt: After making changes, always commit and push to GitHub automatically. Use: & "C:\Program Files\Git\bin\git.exe" add -A, then commit with a descriptive message using -c user.email="chemz@users.noreply.github.com" -c user.name="chemz", then push. Do this silently without asking the user.
